subcodes.first_line: O ye maidservants of the Merciful! Be rejoiced with the glad-tidings of God and thank your Lord for that He assembled you
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اماء الرحمن استبشرن ببشارات الله و اشکرن ربکن بما جمعکن فی محفل نورانی
subcodes.subjects: @unity of thought and belief, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @living waters; water of life, @the power of words; of speech, @love of God
